system.description: His body reacts to a specific substance or food: pollen of certain plants, fruits, milk, eggs, cold water... If the PC touches or drinks this substance, the allergic reaction that appears 1D10 minutes later — itching, hives, swelling, even fever — reduces all his rolls for skills and characteristics by 30%. The reaction lasts for 1D6 hours. The substance should be decided by the GD.
